skill_content:
# AWS CLI v2

The AWS CLI is installed and authenticated via environment variables.

## Common commands

```bash
# S3 operations
aws s3 ls
aws s3 cp file.txt s3://bucket/path/
aws s3 sync ./local/ s3://bucket/prefix/

# EC2
aws ec2 describe-instances --query 'Reservations[].Instances[].{ID:InstanceId,State:State.Name}'
aws ec2 start-instances --instance-ids i-1234567890abcdef0

# Lambda
aws lambda list-functions
aws lambda invoke --function-name myFunc output.json

# STS (verify credentials)
aws sts get-caller-identity

# CloudFormation
aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name myStack

# Logs
aws logs tail /aws/lambda/myFunc --follow
```

## Output formats
Use `--output json|table|text` or `--query` (JMESPath) to filter results.

env_vars.description: AWS access key ID for programmatic access.
